columns.Name: CAND_PREF_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: TC_AF_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Apply Flow that was used for talent community signup. Foreign key to IRC_AF_VERSIONS table.

columns.Name: TC_LEGAL_DESC_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: To track the legal disclaimer accepted by the candidate during talent community signup. Foreign key to IRC_DESC_VERSIONS_B table.

columns.Name: OPT_IN_TC_EMAILS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether the candidate has opted-in or opted-out for receiving job alerts for the site. Null value means unspecified.

columns.Name: OPT_IN_TC_EMAILS_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date and time at which the candidate updated this preference of whether or not to receive job alerts for the site.

columns.Name: TC_CONFIRMED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag is used to determine whether talent community signup of candidate is confirmed for the site or not.

columns.Name: TC_CONFIRMED_DATE
columns.Comments: To track when the talent community signup of candidate changed from Unconfirmed to Confirmed.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
